text_block_list.text:
Today is the start of summer camp, where racers
train to improve their skills!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, is everyone here? You're free to do what
you want, but that doesn't mean you can go
breaking rules left and right.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Don't do anything that'll cause the staff here any
trouble, you hear? If I catch any of you—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What do you think you're doing, El?! Quit eatin'
all those snacks before mealtime!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But I skipped out on breakfast! I'm staaarving!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, you do need some fuel to start the day, but
sugary snacks won't do the job. I've got some rice
balls here, so eat up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Geez. Anyway! Make sure to greet your camp
neighbors in nice, clear voices!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Also—hey, Sky! Stop playing video games on the
bus! You'll give yourself a headache!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nooo, leave me alone. I'm so close to the final
boss... I should be able to catch this whale soon.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Sigh. Do you have anything for travel sickness? Here, take this!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
choice_data_list: (They sure are a lot to handle...)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
This lot is nothing but a bunch of troublemakers, I
swear!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, they sure are a free-spirited bunch. You're
too easy on them, Hishiama.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That's the leader of Miho Dormitory for
you.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No, no! She's a more like a mom than a dorm
leader!

It takes some time to get everyone under control,
but Hishi Amazon's fiery-hot summer camp finally
kicks off!
